name: Deshraj Jogiya
title: Applied Machine Learning Scientist
summary: Detail-oriented and results-driven Applied Machine Learning Scientist with 5 years of extensive experience building scalable model pipelines, cleaning large-scale datasets, and interpreting complex economic patterns and workforce dynamics. Expert in Python, SQL, and machine learning libraries (Scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow) to deploy advanced algorithms, including time-series forecasting, clustering, and regression models. Proven track record of designing end-to-end data pipelines using cloud platforms (AWS) and orchestration engines (Apache Airflow), tracking models with MLflow, and translating complex data into strategic business insights for technical and non-technical stakeholders.

certifications.name: ElevateMe Bootcamp Data Analytics Certificate of Completion

bullets: Collected and validated 10,000+ high-quality data samples for AI/ML model training, utilizing Python-based automated cleaning and validation workflows to improve dataset accuracy and consistency by 20%.

Developed and optimized scalable data pipelines utilizing Python, Scala, and Kubernetes to process large-scale datasets, reducing data processing time by 30% and enhancing overall feature engineering efficiency.
Collaborated cross-functionally with data and research teams to perform quality assurance on robotics datasets, using statistical reasoning to identify patterns and resolve anomalies.

Optimized GPT-4o mini models for resume and job description analysis (NLP skill extraction and job title normalization) using Scikit-learn and OpenAI APIs, achieving a 25% increase in semantic match accuracy.

Model Tracking & Observability: Deployed MLflow for model tracking, parameter logging, and artifact storage, maintaining model version control and reproducibility across development and production environments.
Database & Sync Infrastructure: Established Supabase data sync and PostgreSQL backend data pipelines, reducing data sync latency by 65% and ensuring secure, real-time dataset accessibility.

experience.role: Data Analytics & Machine Learning Fellow Trainee
bullets: Labor Market Analysis: Analyzed large-scale labor market trends and workforce composition datasets with Python and SQL, identifying key growth patterns and wage dynamics to drive strategic recommendations.
Customer & Trend Segmentation: Deployed advanced machine learning models (K-Means clustering, PCA) to segment economic and demographic personas, capturing 92% of data variance.

Business Intelligence Dashboards: Built interactive Tableau and Power BI dashboards to translate complex regression analysis and time-series forecasts into actionable business insights for non-technical stakeholders.
ETL Pipeline Automation: Engineered SQL/Python-based ETL pipelines, migrating legacy workflows to AWS (Glue, S3) and Snowflake to improve workforce data availability by 60%.
Orchestration & Quality: Integrated Apache Airflow orchestration workflows to schedule daily data ingestion, achieving 98% ETL reliability using Great Expectations QA validation.
Business Intelligence Dashboards: Modernized star schema database models in Snowflake, building clean datasets and visualization pipelines for executive sales and operations reporting.

experience.role: Data Engineer & Machine Learning Research Assistant
bullets: Real-time Data Pipelines: Built a streaming data ingestion pipeline using Node.js and MongoDB to process high-frequency labor and economic logs, ensuring 99.9% uptime and a 35% reduction in processing overhead.
Recommendation Engine Development: Constructed a personalized recommendation and matching engine using Python and collaborative filtering algorithms, improving recommendation precision by 12%.
NLP & User Experience: Developed an NLP chatbot to analyze user feedback text, utilizing NLTK/SpaCy to identify core user pain points and drive a 15% increase in user satisfaction.
Motion Telemetry Modeling: Developed Python-based data processing pipelines leveraging Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn, achieving a 3% refinement in motion prediction algorithms.
Data Pipeline Automation: Automated SQL database queries and Python pipelines for real-time sensor telemetry, enabling anomaly detection (Z-scores) and rapid workflow analysis.
Technical Onboarding & KB: Documented and presented data solutions, compiling tutorials on Python libraries and ML techniques to accelerate apprentice onboarding by 25%.
Data Quality & Insights: Cleaned and processed large-scale transaction datasets (500k+ rows) using SQL, reducing data query latency and preparation time by 30%.

SQL Reporting & Visualization: Created interactive Tableau dashboards to track key performance indicators and regional customer acquisition trends, helping drive a 12% improvement in conversion rates.

projects.name: Job Search CRM & AI Application Tailoring Center
projects.description: Engineered a personal job placement command center designed to automate, tailor, and track the job application process. Built a responsive local web interface using FastAPI and Jinja2 templates. Deployed a local SQLite database using SQLAlchemy ORM to track application logs, recruiter follow-ups, and resume revisions. Integrated LLM prompt tailoring chains to align resumes with specific job description keywords.

projects.name: CurioSync: Serverless Tech News & LinkedIn Publisher
projects.description: Built a scheduled serverless news curation and publisher pipeline running on GitHub Actions cron workflows (achieving a 100% hosting cost reduction), integrating LLM chains and LinkedIn APIs to automate daily posting. Designed a Jinja2/HTMX glassmorphic administrative control panel, implementing Fernet symmetric encryption to secure credentials. Developed custom Pillow image-processing engines to automatically render branding graphics.

projects.name: AI Model Observability & Fairness Auditing Pipeline
projects.description: Built a production-grade, modular framework for monitoring machine learning feature drift and auditing demographic fairness metrics in compliance with high-risk system regulations. Built a MLOps framework to monitor ML feature drift using Population Stability Index (PSI), reducing model degradation by 35%. Designed demographic parity and Equal Opportunity bias auditing models in compliance with high-risk frameworks (EU AI Act, US FTC Guidelines). Deployed SQLite audit logging with compliance reporting, visualizing results in Tableau.

projects.name: FinRisk Analytics & Credit Fraud Pipeline
projects.description: Designed and developed an end-to-end real-time credit risk analytics and transaction fraud detection pipeline. Engineered an end-to-end credit risk evaluation pipeline using FastAPI and Python, achieving sub-100ms API response latency for real-time transactional validation. Trained and optimized a Random Forest ensemble model in Scikit-Learn to predict loan default probability, achieving a 92% precision score. Deployed SQLite schemas and transactional fraud anomaly checks with Chart.js dashboard integration.

projects.name: Tax Anomaly Audit Pipeline
projects.description: Designed a compliance data engineering and analytics pipeline to detect tax anomalies, data-entry errors, and anomalous accounting practices in corporate ledgers. Engineered an automated audit pipeline in Python/SQL to ingest and validate general ledger transaction logs, reducing manual prep time by 40%. Implemented Benford's Law statistical modeling and an Isolation Forest anomaly detection algorithm to flag high-risk transactions, achieving a 94% precision rate. Deployed interactive Power BI dashboards visualizing risk scores.

projects.name: Multi-State Land Use Emissions Analysis
projects.description: Developed a geospatial ETL pipeline and analytical database to track emission trends across regional scales. Engineered a Python-based ETL pipeline for land cover datasets from 5 U.S. states, automating emissions inventory compilation with geospatial data transformations, saving 10 hours weekly. Centralized data in a SQL database tracking land-use shifts and built regression forecasts achieving 90% accuracy for emission trends. Developed ArcGIS Dashboards for stakeholder reporting, reducing anomaly detection times by 15%.

projects.name: Automated Daily Data Insights
projects.description: Developed a fully automated daily data analysis and insights generation pipeline. Wrote Python scripts to fetch market and telemetry datasets, executing statistical anomaly detection models. Built a stateless serverless ETL pipeline using Python to ingest real-time market data from yFinance APIs with automated error handling and logging. Programmed rolling statistical Z-score algorithms to detect price anomalies, triggering automated email alerts and report updates. Configured GitHub Actions to run the pipeline daily on cron schedules.

projects.name: Sales Analytics & RFM Customer Segmentation Pipeline
projects.description: Engineered a modular, end-to-end data engineering and clustering pipeline designed to analyze transactional histories. Designed and implemented a SQL database with an optimized Star Schema modeling 100k+ customer transactions. Automated RFM (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) scaling and K-Means clustering in Python, identifying 4 customer personas that captured 92% of variance. Developed a Power BI dashboard to track RFM metrics, helping marketing teams optimize campaign conversion rates by 15%.

projects.name: Clinical Trials Outcomes & Efficacy Analysis Portfolio
projects.description: Developed a data engineering and statistical analysis pipeline for a simulated Phase II oncology clinical trial. Developed a secure clinical trials data ingestion pipeline in SQL/Python to clean and track patient survival, vital signs, and dosage levels. Conducted survival analysis using Kaplan-Meier curves and computed Log-Rank test statistics in SciPy to evaluate treatment efficacy across 3 patient cohorts. Authored Tableau reports showcasing patient outcomes, improving decision reporting speed by 30%.

projects.name: IoT Telematics & Predictive Maintenance Pipeline
projects.description: Created an end-to-end telemetry pipeline designed to process high-frequency sensor streams from a fleet of machinery to schedule predictive maintenance. Engineered a streaming simulation pipeline in Python to ingest high-frequency EV battery and motor telemetry logs in micro-batches. Applied rolling statistical Z-score algorithms on sensor metrics to flag real-time anomalies and prevent device failures. Implemented degradation modeling using exponential decay equations to estimate battery Remaining Useful Life (RUL) and designed Power BI dashboards to track fleet health.

projects.name: AI-ML Data Science Simulation Project
projects.description: Created a scalable data automation system to simulate real-world ETL sales pipelines across multiple branches. Created a data automation system utilizing Python for daily sales data ingestion from 5 branches across states, simulating a real ETL pipeline. Centralized inventory datasets in SQL and visualized trend cycles in Tableau, driving actionable insights. Operated machine learning models (Linear Regression, Random Forest) achieving 90% forecast accuracy and enabling a 15% reduction in stock-outs.

projects.name: Extending STEM across ASL
projects.description: Developed an inclusive platform leveraging deep learning to make core STEM concepts accessible to users with ASL proficiency. Pioneered an inclusive Python platform leveraging TensorFlow and Keras, enabling 7 previously inaccessible STEM concepts. Implemented a sign recognition algorithm and search functionality using Python, cutting gesture redundancy and boosting learning efficiency by 30%. Synthesized feedback from 50+ STEM students, achieving a user satisfaction score of 4.6/5.
